recipes.name: Spicy Anchovy Rice Balls
recipes.storage: Fridge 4 days wrapped in foil squares; freeze half the batch. Pack in jersey pocket in foil — unwrap one-handed.
instructions: Rinse rice until water runs clear; cook with a splash extra water so it binds sticky.
While warm, fold in vinegar, soy, honey, and sesame oil.
Chop anchovies fine with the chili crisp; fold through the rice evenly.
With wet hands, press into 16 golf-ball rounds (~60 g each); roll in furikake.
Cool fully before wrapping — warm balls steam the foil and go mushy.
recipes.notes: The Ride Fuel Unit. 2 balls/hr with a bottle ≈ 39 g carbs/hr; 3/hr ≈ 58 g. Sodium rides along (~230 mg/ball). Re-weigh a batch after any recipe change and update perUnit — the RICE field divisor comes from carbs_g here.
